name: tech-evolution-book
description: Analyze technology evolution in book chapter format. Chapter count is dynamically determined by version count and feature complexity. Every technical improvement preserves its real implementation details with code snippets, architecture diagrams, and benchmark data.
author: hello_strong

changelog.2.0.0: Dynamic chapter planning based on version count. Mandatory real code preservation from papers/GitHub. Exact benchmark numbers. Enhanced PDF analysis including Appendix. GitHub source code integration. 8 anti-pattern rules. New Template F (Quick Reference) and Template G (Citations).
changelog.1.0.0: Initial version with agentic search strategy and PDF analysis.
